assertions.text: Lists at least 2 distinct hypotheses for the root cause
assertions.evidence: H1, H2, H3 enumerated with clear distinctions. All three hypotheses well-articulated.

assertions.text: Proposes a diagnostic step or experiment before jumping to the final fix
assertions.evidence: Explicit 'Smallest Distinguishing Experiment' section with diagnostic log lines to observe state mutations.

assertions.text: Explains what evidence confirms the root cause before applying the fix
assertions.evidence: Confirms H1 through async flow analysis and state mutation tracing.

assertions.text: Correctly identifies shared mutable currentUser variable as the race condition
assertions.evidence: Correctly identifies the module-level shared mutable currentUser variable as the race condition.

assertions.text: Fix removes or localizes the module-level state
assertions.evidence: Proposes removing or localizing the module-level state variable.
